description: Survey start date and time (Qualtrics metadata)
Survey end date and time (Qualtrics metadata)
Date and time when response was recorded (Qualtrics metadata)
Prolific participant ID (embedded data from pre-survey)
Experimental condition ID: 0=Flat, 1=Increasing (embedded data from pre-survey)
Experimental condition as factor: Flat or Increasing (computed from condid)
Replicate number: 0-4 (embedded data from pre-survey)
Whether participant met inclusion criteria: time_to_completion > 50 seconds (computed)
Agreement: "Changing the characteristics of items had an impact on the number of points they received" (QID64, -2=Strongly disagree to 2=Strongly agree)
Agreement: "Some characteristics of items resulted in more points than others" (QID64, -2=Strongly disagree to 2=Strongly agree)
Agreement: "Overall, the characteristics of items mattered for how many points they received" (QID64, -2=Strongly disagree to 2=Strongly agree)
Agreement: "The number of points received didn't seem affected by the characteristics of the items", reversed (QID64, -2=Strongly disagree to 2=Strongly agree, computed as -DV_4_R)
Agreement: "The number of points received didn't seem affected by the characteristics of the items", original (QID64, -2=Strongly disagree to 2=Strongly agree)
Index of illusory beliefs: Mean of DV_1, DV_2, DV_3, DV_4 plus 3 (computed)
Agreement: "I managed to learn which characteristics of items (if any) had an impact on the number of points they received" (QID77, -2=Strongly disagree to 2=Strongly agree)
Agreement: "I understood how the characteristics of items relate to the number of points they received" (QID77, -2=Strongly disagree to 2=Strongly agree)
Agreement: "I know which characteristics affected the number of points item received, and in which direction" (QID77, -2=Strongly disagree to 2=Strongly agree)
Index of confidence in learning: Mean of CouldLearn_1, CouldLearn_2, CouldLearn_3 (computed)
Color characteristic expected to generate HIGHER number of points: 0=Black, 1=Grey, 2=White (QID68 loop 1, renamed from 1_Color)
Shape characteristic expected to generate HIGHER number of points: 0=Circle, 1=Square, 2=Triangle (QID67 loop 1, renamed from 1_Shape)
Size characteristic expected to generate HIGHER number of points: 0=Small, 1=Medium, 2=Large (QID69 loop 1, renamed from 1_Size)
Texture characteristic expected to generate HIGHER number of points: 0=Smooth, 1=Rugged (QID70 loop 1, renamed from 1_Texture)
Color characteristic expected to generate LOWER number of points: 0=Black, 1=Grey, 2=White (QID68 loop 2, renamed from 2_Color)
Shape characteristic expected to generate LOWER number of points: 0=Circle, 1=Square, 2=Triangle (QID67 loop 2, renamed from 2_Shape)
Size characteristic expected to generate LOWER number of points: 0=Small, 1=Medium, 2=Large (QID69 loop 2, renamed from 2_Size)
Texture characteristic expected to generate LOWER number of points: 0=Smooth, 1=Rugged (QID70 loop 2, renamed from 2_Texture)
Probability estimate: How likely it is that the "higher points" item will receive more points than the "lower points" item (QID71, renamed from EdgeProbability, 50-100%)
